request_debug.prompt_preview:
You are the final consolidation step in a startup slopmortem pipeline. Earlier stages compared a fresh pitch against several historical startup failures and produced per-failure lessons. Your job: pick and rank the lessons that actually apply to THIS pitch, dedup paraphrases, and explain why each applies.

Rules:
- Only consolidate lessons from the input list. Do NOT invent new risks. If a theme spans multiple lessons, write one canonical summary covering them.
- Drop lessons that do not apply t

response.text: {"top_risks":[{"summary":"Lock in enterprise platform-engineering teams before hyperscalers bundle preview environment tooling natively.","applies_because":"The pitch targets 'managing ephemeral preview environments across cloud providers' — AWS, GCP, and Azure already offer native environment and preview tooling that could be bundled, directly threatening this niche.","raised_by":["parse::devtools"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Gate the hosted control plane behind a paid tier early; never let the free CLI be the only value delivery mechanism.","applies_because":"The pitch explicitly ships a 'CLI plus a hosted control plane' — the free CLI risks becoming the primary touchpoint with no monetization, replicating RethinkDB's revenue void.","raised_by":["rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Establish enterprise or mid-market contracts alongside bottoms-up CLI adoption — developer traction alone won't sustain the business.","applies_because":"The pitch is 'developer-focused' with a CLI as a primary artifact, which mirrors the bottoms-up OSS motion that left RethinkDB without enterprise revenue to sustain operations.","raised_by":["rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Define the paid conversion funnel before launch: know which CLI users should upgrade to the hosted plane and what triggers it.","applies_because":"The pitch bundles a free CLI with a hosted control plane — without a clear upgrade trigger, CLI users will never convert, directly repeating RethinkDB's monetization failure.","raised_by":["rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"high"},{"summary":"Architect for multi-cloud portability from day one so users aren't stranded if you shut down or pivot.","applies_because":"The pitch explicitly targets 'managing ephemeral preview environments across cloud providers' — users who depend on the hosted control plane face migration pain analogous to Parse's shutdown moment.","raised_by":["parse::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Differentiate on CI/CD and PR workflow depth, not raw environment spin-up speed, which is easily commoditized.","applies_because":"The pitch's core offering — 'ephemeral preview environments' — is a speed/convenience play that hyperscalers and competitors can replicate; deeper workflow integration is the defensible moat.","raised_by":["parse::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Track revenue-correlated metrics (teams created, environments provisioned per paying org) from day one, not just CLI downloads or stars.","applies_because":"The developer-focused CLI will generate vanity metrics; the pitch's dual CLI+control-plane model makes it easy to conflate developer adoption with business health, as RethinkDB did.","raised_by":["rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Avoid over-investing in feature breadth before proving willingness-to-pay; ship the paid hosted plane fast and iterate.","applies_because":"The pitch describes a multi-cloud control plane with CLI — a technically ambitious surface area that risks expanding before any paying customer validates the core value.","raised_by":["rethinkdb::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Maintain an open-source core or clear data-export story to protect community trust against a churn spike on shutdown or acquisition.","applies_because":"The hosted control plane stores environment configuration and state — a shutdown or acquisition without a data-export path would mirror the trust collapse Parse users experienced.","raised_by":["parse::devtools"],"severity":"medium"},{"summary":"Build for standalone profitability to avoid single-acquirer dependency that could kill the product.","applies_because":"The pitch targets platform-engineering teams — a segment attractive to hyperscaler acquirers — making strategic-parent dependency a plausible existential risk as seen with Parse.","raised_by":["parse::devtools"],"severity":"low"}],"injection_detected":false}
